channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Taiwan leader visits Eswatini despite China’s attempts to block trip
item.description: President William Lai Ching-te says he met King Mswati III and signed trade agreements.

item.title: Joel Embiid, 76ers knock out second-seeded Celtics in NBA Playoffs
item.description: The 76ers eliminate one of the favourites to book a second-round series against the New York Knicks.

item.title: In Yemen, Starlink internet brings opportunities – for some
item.description: Despite Houthi resistance and affordability challenges, Starlink fuels growth in Yemen's digital workforce.

item.title: Teen F1 leader Antonelli takes Miami pole as race start time changed
item.description: Threat of heavy rainstorm in Miami causes organisers to move up race start time to 17:00 GMT on Sunday.

item.title: Carlos Prates punishes Jack Della Maddalena at UFC Fight Night Australia
item.description: Brazil's Prates crushes hometown hero Maddalena in the Perth fight; challenges the winner of Makhachev vs Garry.

item.title: Millions of jobs lost as Iranians battle ‘Operation Economic Fury’
item.description: A fragile ceasefire may have paused the US-Israeli war on Iran, but the economic cost is crippling life in Tehran.

item.title: US approves $8.6bn in arms sales to Middle East allies
item.description: US State Department cites emergency circumstances to fast-track sales without the approval of Congress.

item.title: UAE lifts all air traffic restrictions introduced since Iran war
item.description: UAE aviation authority's announcement is the latest sign of the travel sector's recovery across the Middle East.

item.title: Trump expresses doubt that Iran’s peace proposal is ‘acceptable’
item.description: US president says he is considering the 14-point peace plan, but warns strikes could resume if Tehran 'misbehaves'.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump to review 14-point plan; Israel pounds Lebanon
item.description: US president says he will 'soon be reviewing the plan Iran has just sent to us', but doesn't think he can make a deal.

item.title: Philippines volcano erupts, blanketing ash across the sky
item.description: The Mayon Volcano has erupted, spewing a cloud of ash and debris across Bicol, in the Philippines.

item.title: The rise of political violence under Trump
item.description: Redi Tlhabi speaks to Professor Robert Pape on the rise of political violence in the US.

item.title: Why are maritime laws failing to secure the seas?
item.description: Wars and territorial disputes are rewriting the rules of global shipping.

item.title: Timmy the humpback whale escapes to the North Sea
item.description: The whale calf's repeated stranding off the coast of Germany sparked widespread concern and extensive media coverage.

item.title: Spirit Airlines collapses amid rising fuel costs from war on Iran
item.description: US budget carrier Spirit Airlines shuts down after talks for a government bailout failed.

item.title: At least six dead in heavy rains in northeast Brazil, thousands displaced
item.description: Studies show extreme rain has become more frequent in country, as Pernambuco and Paraiba states again battered.

item.title: Khartoum drone strike kills five in Sudan, NGO reports
item.description: The attack, the second in a week, follows months of relative calm in the city after government forces regained control.

item.title: Ukraine eyes Belarus border activities as Russian strikes persist
item.description: The role of Belarus in Russia's war on Ukraine has provoked sanctions from Kyiv, which says it is ready to respond.

item.title: Syria becomes alternative energy corridor for oil as Hormuz effectively blo
item.description: Syria is receiving hundreds of Iraqi oil trucks hauling crude overland as an alternative energy corridor to Europe.

item.title: Israel’s expanding ‘orange line’ tightens deadly no-go zones in Gaza
item.description: Israel’s expanding “orange line” is deepening movement restrictions across Gaza, raising deadly risks for civilians.

item.title: Arsenal ease past Fulham to pull six points clear of Manchester City
item.description: Viktor Gyokeres scores twice in Arsenal's 3-0 win against Fulham to boost hopes of ending 22-year title wait.

item.title: Spain demands Israel release arrested Gaza flotilla crew member
item.description: Saif Abukeshek was taken to Israel after forces raided the Global Sumid Flotilla off the coast of Greece.

item.title: Devastation of Southern Lebanon continues under ‘ceasefire’
item.description: At least 41 people killed as Israel launches 50 airstrikes on southern Lebanon in 24 hours.

item.title: Yemen reports hijacked oil tanker headed for Somalia
item.description: The incident marks at least the fourth vessel hijacking near Somalia in recent weeks.

item.title: Spain’s Sanchez demands Netanyahu free Spaniard seized on aid flotilla
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez is demanding Israel to release the 'abducted' Spaniard taken from the flotilla.
